nodes.name: Heleia
nodes.summary: Heleia（Heleia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Javan heleia、Grey-hooded heleia、Pygmy heleia等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grey-hooded heleia
nodes.summary: Grey-hooded heleia（Heleia pinaiae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Grey-hooded heleia。

nodes.name: Grey-hooded heleia
nodes.summary: The grey-hooded heleia (Heleia pinaiae), also known as the grey-hooded white-eye and grey-hooded ibon, is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to Seram Island. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References
